Research & Innovation

Specializing in numerical simulation and experimental design within fluid dynamics and thermal sciences.

Area of Interest

  • ✓ Simulation in the field of fluid and heat transfer
  • ✓ Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD)
  • ✓ AI Integration in Teaching & Learning
  • ✓ ANSYS & SOLIDWORKS Modeling

Focus

Published research papers in SCI/SCOPUS indexed Journals and conferences on contemporary trends in mechanical engineering.

  • ISIE 2022 Coordinator: GO-Karting race at BUDH international circuit, Greater Noida.
